relationships: kab:Deg tazwara kullec yella iteddu akken iwata
kab:Tom yejreḥ deg uεrur mi yella yetturar tinis
kab:Mary txemmem dakken yella yessefk ad teddu
kab:Tom yella iḥemmel ad yexdem d Mary
kab:Ziri yella akken kan iteddu ad d-iruḥ s axxam
kab:Mary tenna-d dakken yella yessefk ad tebḍu
kab:Mary tella teẓra dakken yella yessefk ad tgiǧǧ
kab:Mary tella teẓra dakken yella yessefk ad terwel
kab:Lliɣ ẓriɣ dakken Tom yella yesɛa uguren
kab:Mary tenna-iyi-d dakken yella deg-s ccek
kab:Mary tenna-d dakken yella yejreḥ wul-is
kab:Ur yelli ara deg telzemt ass-a, neɣ yella﹖
kab:Mary tenna-d dakken yella deg-s ccek
kab:Ur tezmireḍ ara ad tenseḍ di berra, yella usemmiḍ
kab:Ur iḥemmel ara Tom ad inheṛ ticki yella wagu
kab:Tom yella ur yezmir ara ad yeggani
kab:Dacu i yellan deg-s ma yella kra n yiwen i t-yeẓṛan﹖
